name: CEA Industries Inc.
summary: PART I Overview CEA Industries, through our subsidiary, Surna Cultivation Technologies LLC, has been focused on selling environmental control and other technologies and services to the Controlled Environment Agriculture (CEA) industry. The CEA industry aims to optimize the use of horticultural resources such as water, energy, space, capital, and labor, to create an agriculture business that is more efficient and more productive than those that use traditional farming methods.
